global.title: Al-Azhar Globally
global.subtitle: For over a thousand years, Al-Azhar has welcomed students from around the world, serving as a civilizational bridge connecting peoples and cultures
global.reachDescription: Al-Azhar's influence extends to every continent, welcoming students from over 100 countries and providing scholarships and diverse educational programs that serve Muslim communities worldwide.
global.heritageDescription: Al-Azhar plays a pivotal role in preserving and disseminating Islamic heritage globally through digitizing manuscripts, establishing specialized research centers, and training imams and scholars from around the world.

programs.admissionsSubtitle: Присоединяйтесь к самому престижному исламскому университету мира
programs.step1Desc: Просмотрите наши академические программы и найдите подходящую
programs.step2Desc: Ознакомьтесь с требованиями и необходимыми документами
programs.step3Desc: Заполните форму заявки и приложите документы
programs.step4Desc: Ваша заявка будет рассмотрена и вы будете уведомлены
programs.tuitionDesc: Стоимость зависит от программы и гражданства. Свяжитесь с приёмной комиссией.
programs.scholarshipsDesc: Аль-Азхар предоставляет стипендии выдающимся студентам со всего мира.

tour.title: Виртуальная экскурсия по кампусу
tour.subtitle: Откройте для себя университет Аль-Азхар из любой точки мира
tour.tourCompleteText: Вы исследовали кампус университета Аль-Азхар. Посетите нас лично, чтобы оценить всю красоту этого исторического учебного заведения.

elearning.subtitle: Учитесь у учёных Аль-Азхара из любой точки мира - Бесплатные курсы по исламским наукам и арабскому языку
elearning.reason1Desc: Учитесь у сертифицированных профессоров Аль-Азхара с мировым опытом
elearning.reason3Desc: Учитесь в любое время, в любом месте, в своём темпе
elearning.reason4Desc: Полные учебные программы по различным исламским наукам и арабскому языку

studentLife.title: Студенческая жизнь
studentLife.subtitle: Откройте для себя яркую кампусную жизнь университета Аль-Азхар
studentLife.club1Desc: Quran recitation groups, hadith study sessions, and Islamic scholarship discussions led by senior students and faculty.
studentLife.club2Desc: Arabic rhetoric, oratory skills, and competitive debating for students passionate about public discourse.
studentLife.club3Desc: Collaborative research projects, hackathons, and innovation challenges bridging science and faith.
studentLife.club4Desc: Connecting international students from 100+ countries through cultural events, language exchanges, and friendships.
studentLife.club5Desc: Football, basketball, athletics, swimming, and more. Compete in inter-university tournaments and stay active.
studentLife.club6Desc: Arabic calligraphy workshops, art exhibitions, and creative expression rooted in Islamic artistic traditions.
studentLife.facility1Desc: Modern housing for 50,000+ students with furnished rooms, study areas, and 24/7 security.
studentLife.facility2Desc: 24/7 access to over 2 million volumes, rare manuscripts, digital resources, and quiet study spaces.
studentLife.facility3Desc: Olympic-size swimming pool, fully equipped gyms, basketball and tennis courts, and an athletics track.
studentLife.facility4Desc: Multiple dining halls serving halal food, international cuisine, and affordable meal plans for students.
studentLife.facility5Desc: On-campus medical clinic, dental services, mental health counseling, and emergency care.
studentLife.facility6Desc: Multiple prayer areas across campus including the historic Al-Azhar Mosque for daily and Friday prayers.
studentLife.event1Desc: Welcome new students with orientation sessions, campus tours, and social activities to kick off the academic year.
studentLife.event2Desc: A prestigious Quran recitation and memorization competition attracting participants from around the world.
studentLife.event3Desc: Students showcase innovative research projects and scientific achievements across all disciplines.
studentLife.event4Desc: A grand celebration honoring graduates in the presence of distinguished scholars and leaders.
studentLife.testimonial1Quote: Al-Azhar has given me not just knowledge, but a global perspective on Islamic scholarship. The diversity of students here is truly inspiring.
studentLife.testimonial2Quote: Coming from Senegal, I found a second home at Al-Azhar. The cultural exchange society helped me connect with students from all over the world.
studentLife.testimonial3Quote: The balance between modern science and Islamic values at Al-Azhar is unique. I am proud to be part of this thousand-year legacy.
studentLife.ctaDescription: Станьте частью сообщества, формирующего умы уже более тысячи лет.
